mapper.select: select bdi.id, bdi.tenant_id, bdi.calendar_code, bdi.biz_date, bdi.day_status, bc.timezone, bc.cutoff_time from batch.batch_day_instance bdi join batch.business_calendar bc on bc.tenant_id = bdi.tenant_id and bc.calendar_code = bdi.calendar_code and bc.enabled = true where bdi.day_status = 'OPEN' and bdi.cutoff_at is null order by bdi.biz_date asc, bdi.id asc
